_comment: xstockstrat-agent MCP configuration for Claude.ai / Claude Desktop.
_usage: Paste the relevant block into your Claude Desktop config or Claude.ai MCP settings.

xstockstrat-stdio._mode: stdio -- run locally outside Docker (recommended for Claude Desktop)

xstockstrat-sse-oauth._mode: SSE remote MCP with OAuth 2.1 (RECOMMENDED for Claude.ai). The client discovers the auth server via /.well-known, performs RFC 7591 DCR + PKCE login, and connects with an aud-bound JWT. No api_key needed.

xstockstrat-sse-apikey-deprecated._mode: DEPRECATED Desktop-only fallback -- API key in ?api_key= query parameter. OAuth 2.1 forbids credentials in query strings; prefer xstockstrat-sse-oauth. Kept only for clients that cannot perform the OAuth flow.
